title: Day by Day
excerpt: The days continue to go by faster and faster. My plan for documenting 2014 is much like 2013 was - to stick with Project Life - it may be on a weekly basis, it may not. I will continue to…
body:
The days continue to go by faster and faster. My plan for documenting 2014 is much like 2013 was - to stick with Project Life - it may be on a weekly basis, it may not. I will continue to do scrapbook pages, and hopefully not simply stack them into a pile, but actually get them into page protectors and albums. Jack will have an album dedicated just to him, and I will do a separate album for random photos. I also plan on giving more of the pages away to family members and friends who will appreciate it. Here are the projects I made using the Copper Mountain Scrapbook kit only.

Whether you are a Project Life pro or a newbie, the newest online class by Studio Calico, Day By Day may be just what you need to jump start your creativity and help keep you on track. Head into your 2014 Project Life® album with a team of experts by your side. The Studio Calico Creative Team will help you start your album by sharing videos, tutorials, and a detailed look at their approach to their own spreads come together throughout the month of January. The support doesn’t end there – the team will be on the class message boards all year long to share journaling and photo prompts, sketches, and the encouragement you need to keep you going. Take advantage of their expertise and get ready to record your year, DAY BY DAY.

Only a few days left to enroll! Sign up ends December 31st. Once you're enrolled, you'll have immediate access to the classroom and class message board. I'll be contributing - hope to see you there! Class will start on January 1, 2014.
